blackjack.title: Blackjack
blackjack.summary:
Beat the dealer, not the table.

Blackjack is a fast card game where your goal is to finish closer to 21 than the dealer without going over.

  • Quick tactical decisions
  • Strong hands can pay immediately
  • Every extra card changes the risk
blackjack.howToPlay:
Round flow

  • Place your bet and start the hand
  • Hit to draw another card
  • Stand to keep your total
  • Double to raise the stake for one last card
  • Split when you receive a pair

If your hand beats the dealer without busting, you win.

roulette.title: Roulette
roulette.summaryZero:
The classic single-zero table.

European roulette is the cleaner version of roulette, built around one green zero and a wide range of betting styles.

  • Bet on exact numbers
  • Cover colors, odds, evens, or ranges
  • Mix safer bets with high-payout picks
roulette.summaryZeroZero:
Same thrill, extra edge on the wheel.

American roulette adds both 0 and 00, keeping the same core flow while shifting the odds slightly.

  • More green pockets
  • Same inside and outside bets
  • Classic casino feel
roulette.howToPlay:
How a spin works

  • Pick your chip value
  • Place bets on numbers or board sections
  • Spin the wheel and watch where the ball lands
  • Winning bets pay automatically

You can combine cautious and risky bets in the same round.

slots.title: Slots
slots.description: Classic slot machine. Match symbols across paylines to win. The rarer the symbol, the higher the payout!

summary.3x3:
Compact and classic.

This 3x3 machine keeps the action clean and readable, perfect for quick spins and straightforward wins.

  • Fast sessions
  • Simple reel layout
  • Easy to read at a glance
summary.3x5:
More reels, more routes to win.

The 3x5 setup opens the board with extra paylines and more room for symbol combinations.

  • Wider than 3x3
  • More active line variety
  • A bit more strategic
summary.5x5:
Big grid, loud energy.

This 5x5 version fills the screen with a denser reel field and a more chaotic spin pattern.

  • Largest visual board
  • High-action feel
  • Best for a busier machine

slots.howToPlay:
Spin sequence

  • Choose the machine type
  • Set your bet amount
  • Spin the reels and watch the symbols land
  • Matching symbols on active paylines create payouts

Keep spinning or end the session whenever you want.

controls.insufficientBalanceCurrentBet: You need at least {{bet}} to keep spinning this session.

capyroad.title: Capyroad
capyroad.description: Cross one road at a time to raise your multiplier. Every jump increases the potential payout, but also the crash risk. Cash out whenever you want to secure the winnings.
capyroad.summary:
Crossy Road energy with betting pressure.

Capyroad is a risk-and-cashout game inspired by Crossy Road and Chicken Road. Each safe lane pushes your capybara forward and raises the multiplier.

  • Safe crosses build the reward
  • Each new lane adds tension
  • You choose when to stop and secure the run
capyroad.howToPlay:
Push your luck

  • Start a round to enter the road
  • Press Cross to move to the next lane
  • Each success increases the payout multiplier
  • The crash chance also rises as you keep going
  • Use Cash out before a crash to lock the reward

Longer runs can pay more, but one mistake can wipe the round.
